Blog

Helpful homeowner guides.

Educational resources for audits, insulation, thermostats, and electrification planning.

How to prepare for a home energy audit

Bring utility bills, note comfort complaints, and list any recent equipment changes.

Air sealing before adding insulation

The order matters because leakage can erase some of the value of added insulation.

Thermostat schedules that save money

Simple schedules are often better than complex programming nobody wants to maintain.

Electrification planning without overspending

Start with the panel, the load, and the sequence that avoids duplicate work.
